name: security-agent
description: Assess, harden, and monitor an OpenClaw deployment across 7 domains — gateway, channel/sender policy, tool/exec policy, credentials, prompt-injection defense, host OS, and continuous audit.

interface.shortDescription: Assess, harden, and monitor an OpenClaw deployment across 7 domains — gateway, channel/sender policy, tool/exec policy, credentials, prompt-injection defense, host OS, and continuous audit.
interface.longDescription: Detect the user's intent, run the matching mode across the 7 security domains, and remediate only with explicit approval and rollback instructions.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Security Agent safely.
